title: NGE Google
wikitext:
[]: NGE + Google = ???             Quote Post by Kadou » Thu Jul 06, 2006 11:52 pm I've just noticed something odd while searching for something on Google. After searching for something and going to the bottom of the page, I noticed that some of the images were missing. I thought it was my connection going again and ignored it, but then I noticed that a crushed image on the right looked oddly familiar. I went and viewed the image, and what I get is... ... my Firefox reloading images. Eeyup, nothing to see here. >_>

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Fri Jul 07, 2006 1:53 am I dunno what's going on here....but what about Keel? I'd say google was having some issues at the moment you searched.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 07, 2006 1:55 am Which browser are you using? The only problem I've ever had with Firefox is an occasional screw-up in the image caching, so that the wrong image gets pulled out. Try a full refresh (ctrl-shift-left-click); that usually clears things up.

[]:             Quote Post by Kadou » Fri Jul 07, 2006 2:14 am Mr. Tines wrote: Which browser are you using? The only problem I've ever had with Firefox is an occasional screw-up in the image caching, so that the wrong image gets pulled out. Try a full refresh (ctrl-shift-left-click); that usually clears things up.
